name: The Quiet Hours Ordinance
text:
City Hall observes quiet hours. While it is after the loudest player at the table last laughed, opponents can't cast spells with the word "chaos," "goblin," "snack," or any exclamation point in their text.
Whenever an opponent raises their voice, cheers, or says "re-elected," you draw a card and issue a noise citation (they lose 1 life).
flavorText: A complaint was filed about the noise. The complaint was, regrettably, very loud.
